payload.text:
You are a UI/UX designer creating a comprehensive frontend MVP for DOFTA — The Farmer's Digital Co-operative for the Web4 Era. This clickable demo will showcase the platform's value proposition to clients, partners, and investors within a 3-minute live demonstration.

**Project Overview**
DOFTA is a decentralized, AI-driven agricultural platform where farmers and buyers co-own, co-govern, and co-profit. Farmers earn tokens for preventing waste, trading produce, and capturing carbon, while buyers source verified produce transparently.

**Target Users**
- Primary: Farmers (mobile-first experience)
- Secondary: Buyers (web dashboard experience)

**Core Design Principle**
Every screen must immediately answer: "What do I do next, and why does it benefit me?"

**Required Screens & User Flows**

1. **Onboarding Flow**
   - Role selection interface (Farmer/Buyer) with clear benefit statements
   - Auto-generated wallet and digital ID creation (show as seamless)
   - Trust signals emphasizing verification, transparency, and cooperative ownership
   - Progress indicators showing completion steps

2. **Farmer Mobile Dashboard**
   - Overview cards: crop health status, tokens earned (WASTE, CARBO, DOFTA), carbon impact
   - Empty-state guidance with specific actions farmers can take
   - Value proposition callouts for first-time users
   - Quick action buttons for common tasks

3. **Monitoring & Alerts Interface**
   - Sensor + AI insights dashboard with mock data
   - Spoilage-risk alerts with specific, actionable recommendations
   - Visual connection: prevented loss → token rewards earned
   - Real-time status indicators

4. **Tokenized Rewards Wallet**
   - WASTE tokens from waste prevention with earning explanations
   - CARBO NFTs from verified carbon capture with visual certificates
   - Timeline view: "specific actions → corresponding rewards"
   - Redemption/usage options clearly displayed

5. **Marketplace Interface**
   - Farmer listing flow: quantity input, quality scores, sustainability badges
   - Buyer browsing with filtering and bidding capabilities
   - Smart contract escrow shown via simple 3-step progress indicators
   - Trust signals and verification badges throughout

6. **Carbon Credit Minting Flow**
   - Step-by-step satellite and AI verification process
   - NFT carbon credit creation with visual progress
   - ESG buyer marketplace integration
   - Impact metrics and environmental benefits highlighted

7. **DeFi Access Portal**
   - Credit scoring visualization based on trade/token history
   - Microloan eligibility with clear qualification criteria
   - Financial inclusion messaging with simple language
   - Risk and benefit explanations

8. **Governance Dashboard**
   - DAO voting interface for fees and reinvestment decisions
   - Governance token display with voting weight visualization
   - Participation incentives and collective ownership benefits
   - Voting history and impact of decisions

**Design Requirements**
- Step-by-step flows with prominent progress indicators
- Plain-language explanations for all Web3 concepts
- Comprehensive state management: loading, success, error, and empty states
- Trust-first UI: verification badges, transparency metrics, impact data
- Clean, modern Web3 + agri-tech aesthetic
- Earth-toned color palette with one strong accent color for CTAs
- Responsive design: mobile-first for farmers, desktop-optimized for buyers
- Accessibility considerations for rural users with varying tech literacy

**Technical Implementation**
- Frontend: Rust-based using modern framework (Leptos, Yew, or Dioxus)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS or equivalent utility-first approach
- Architecture: Modular, reusable component structure
- Data: Realistic mock data and placeholder content
- Focus: Visual demonstration over backend functionality

**Success Criteria**
The MVP should effectively communicate DOFTA's value proposition as a decentralized, cooperative agricultural platform while maintaining simplicity, building trust, and ensuring approachability for users with varying technical backgrounds. Every interaction should reinforce the cooperative ownership model and demonstrate clear pathways to value creation for all participants.

**Beginning Platform Design**

I've started by defining the platform's core need: a clickable MVP for DOFTA, which is short for "The Farmer's Digital Co-operative for the Web4 Era." My initial focus is on the essential functionalities required for a good demo, to provide a feel for the platform.


**Building the Core MVP**

I'm now diving into the design of the screens, with a focus on a clean aesthetic that blends Web3 and agri-tech. I'm building a single-page app and I'll use a simple state management system. I'm prioritizing the onboarding flow, starting with role selection (Farmer/Buyer) and a simulated wallet/ID creation. A progress bar will be vital for showing the steps.


**Detailing Core Screen Elements**

I've been breaking down the necessary screens and user flows for the DOFTA platform demo. I'm focusing on a mobile-first approach for farmers and a desktop experience for buyers, building a single-page React app with a simple state management system. I'm prioritizing the onboarding process, farmer dashboard overview, a monitoring/alerts view, tokenized rewards, and a marketplace. Additionally, I'm thinking through carbon credit minting and a DeFi access portal.


**Outlining App Architecture**

I'm now establishing the application's basic structure and necessary components. I'll utilize a single-page approach, which makes transitions smoother between various views, such as onboarding, dashboard (farmer and buyer), monitoring, wallet, marketplace, and carbon credit minting. I'll maintain shared types and build reusable components where possible.


**Mapping Platform Functionality**

I'm presently building out the components and the overarching application structure for the DOFTA platform, focusing on the planned user flows. I'll maintain shared types and reusable components. Now, I have the key components ready, including the Onboarding, Dashboard, Monitoring, Wallet, Marketplace, Carbon Credit Minting, DeFi Portal, and Governance screens. I'm focusing on UI elements.


**Building Application Structure**

I'm now focusing on a basic application structure and necessary components for the front-end MVP. I'm building a single-page app to ensure smooth transitions between views like onboarding, dashboards for both farmer and buyer, monitoring, wallet, marketplace, carbon credit minting, a DeFi portal, and governance screens. I'm focusing on defining shared types and reusable components. I've designed the application to focus on UI elements, building them according to the requirements of each module.


**Structuring the MVP App**

I'm presently building the front-end structure, starting with `App.tsx` and defining state management using `useState`. I've outlined shared types like `UserRole` and `Screen` in `types.ts`, and am building a central `icons.tsx` component to handle all the SVG icons. I'm focusing on the component structure and data types, to prepare for a robust foundation.


**Constructing App Components**

I'm currently building the application's components. I've designed the shared components, including the `Header`, `BottomNav`, `Card`, and `Button`. I'm also preparing for the screen-specific components, such as `Onboarding`, `FarmerDashboard`, and `Wallet`, along with their mock data. I'm focusing on creating reusable UI elements.


**Constructing the Demo's Structure**

I'm now building the application, and have started by defining shared components and types, including the `Header`, `BottomNav`, and `Card`, alongside state management. I've designed the `Onboarding` flow, with a focus on ease of use and simulating various loading states to enhance realism. I'm focusing on the mobile-first dashboard and user experience.


**Establishing Core Application Structure**

I'm solidifying the application structure. I've focused on essential components and shared types, laying a strong foundation. Specifically, I have defined all screen components and have planned for a smooth onboarding process. I'm prioritizing user experience and navigation, as this is a demo, and that is vital. I am focusing on building the core components and UI elements, to build the user flow.

entries.description: Create metadata file for the DOFTA application.
Create the main HTML file, including Tailwind CSS and a root element for the React app.
Create the entry point for the React application, rendering the App component.
The main application component, handling routing and state for the DOFTA demo.
Define global TypeScript types and enums for the DOFTA application.
Centralized SVG icons for use throughout the application.
Create a reusable Card component for consistent styling.
Create a reusable Button component with different visual variants.
Create a header component for the application, displaying the logo and user context.
Create a sticky bottom navigation bar for the farmer's mobile-first experience.
Create the onboarding flow screen for role selection and simulated wallet creation.
Create the main dashboard for the Farmer user role, showing key metrics and actions.

diffs.replacement:
import React from 'react'; import Card from './shared/Card'; import Button from './shared/Button'; import { Screen } from '../types'; import { WasteIcon, CarbonIcon, GovIcon, LeafIcon, BellIcon, ArrowRightIcon } from './icons'; interface FarmerDashboardProps { navigate: (screen: Screen) => void; } const FarmerDashboard: React.FC = ({ navigate }) => { return (

Hello, Farmer John

Here's your farm's performance today.

{/* Main Stats Cards */}

Crop Health

98%

+2% this week

Carbon Impact

2.1 tCO₂e

sequestered
{/* Token Balances */} navigate(Screen.Wallet)}>

Your Co-op Tokens

Rewards for your sustainable practices.

WASTE

From waste prevention

1,250

CARBO

From carbon capture

5 NFT

DOFTA

Co-op governance

350

 {/* Alerts */} navigate(Screen.Monitoring)} className="bg-yellow-100 border border-yellow-300">

High Spoilage Risk Alert

Sector 4 tomatoes show high moisture. Act now to prevent 50kg of loss and earn WASTE tokens.

View Recommendation
{/* Quick Actions */}

What do you want to do?

); }; export default FarmerDashboard;

entries.description: Create the main dashboard for the Buyer user role, focusing on sourcing and marketplace activity.

diffs.replacement:
import React from 'react'; import Card from './shared/Card'; import Button from './shared/Button'; import { Screen } from '../types'; import { MarketplaceIcon, CheckCircleIcon, ArrowRightIcon } from './icons'; import { MarketplaceListing } from '../types'; interface BuyerDashboardProps { navigate: (screen: Screen) => void; } const mockListings: MarketplaceListing[] = [ { id: '1', product: 'Organic Tomatoes', farmer: 'Green Valley Farms', quantity: 200, unit: 'kg', qualityScore: 95, sustainabilityBadges: ['Water-Wise', 'Low-Carbon'], pricePerUnit: 2.5, imageUrl: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/tomatoes/400/300' }, { id: '2', product: 'Heirloom Carrots', farmer: 'Sunset Acres', quantity: 150, unit: 'kg', qualityScore: 92, sustainabilityBadges: ['Organic'], pricePerUnit: 1.8, imageUrl: 'https://picsum.photos/seed/carrots/400/300' }, ]; const BuyerDashboard: React.FC = ({ navigate }) => { return (

Welcome, Fresh Foods Inc.

Source verified, sustainable produce directly from the farm.

{/* Main Content Area */}

Featured Listings

{mockListings.map(listing => ( navigate(Screen.Marketplace)}>

{listing.product}

from {listing.farmer}

${listing.pricePerUnit.toFixed(2)}/{listing.unit}

{listing.quantity} {listing.unit} available

{listing.sustainabilityBadges.map(badge => ( {badge} ))}
))}
{/* Sidebar */}

Why Source from DOFTA?

  • Full Traceability: Know the journey of your produce from seed to shelf.
  • Verified Sustainability: Meet your ESG goals with produce backed by real data.
  • Co-operative Model: Your purchase directly supports and empowers farmers.

Your Recent Activity

Bid on Organic Potatoes

Status: Pending

Contract for Apples

Status: Completed
); }; export default BuyerDashboard;

entries.description: Create the Monitoring & Alerts screen, showing sensor data and actionable recommendations.

diffs.replacement:
import React from 'react'; import { LineChart, Line, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; import Card from './shared/Card'; import { SunIcon, DropletIcon, ThermometerIcon, LeafIcon, ArrowRightIcon } from './icons'; import { Alert } from '../types'; const mockSensorData = [ { name: '6 days ago', moisture: 30, temp: 22, health: 92 }, { name: '5 days ago', moisture: 32, temp: 23, health: 93 }, { name: '4 days ago', moisture: 35, temp: 24, health: 95 }, { name: '3 days ago', moisture: 45, temp: 23, health: 96 }, { name: '2 days ago', moisture: 55, temp: 22, health: 97 }, { name: 'Yesterday', moisture: 65, temp: 21, health: 98 }, { name: 'Today', moisture: 75, temp: 22, health: 98 }, ]; const mockAlerts: Alert[] = [ { id: '1', title: 'High Spoilage Risk', description: 'Sector 4 tomatoes show high moisture levels.', recommendation: 'Increase ventilation and consider early harvest for affected plants.', severity: 'high', timestamp: '2 hours ago' }, { id: '2', title: 'Nutrient Deficiency', description: 'Low nitrogen detected in Sector 2 corn.', recommendation: 'Apply a nitrogen-rich fertilizer as per soil analysis.', severity: 'medium', timestamp: '1 day ago' }, ]; const Monitoring: React.FC = () => { const highRiskAlert = mockAlerts.find(a => a.severity === 'high'); return (

Monitoring & Alerts

Real-time AI insights from your farm sensors.

{highRiskAlert && (

{highRiskAlert.title}

{highRiskAlert.description}

Action Recommended:

{highRiskAlert.recommendation}

By taking action, you can prevent ~50kg of loss and earn 25 WASTE tokens.

 )}

Crop Health Trend (Tomatoes - Sector 4)

25°C

Air Temp

68%

Soil Moisture

22°C

Soil Temp

All Alerts

{mockAlerts.map(alert => (

{alert.title}

{alert.description}

 ))}
); }; export default Monitoring;

entries.description: Create the Tokenized Rewards Wallet screen, displaying token balances and transaction history.
Create the Marketplace screen, with different views for Farmer (listing) and Buyer (browsing).
Create the Carbon Credit Minting flow screen with a step-by-step verification process.
Create the DeFi Access Portal screen, visualizing credit scores and micro-loan eligibility.

diffs.replacement:
import React from 'react'; import Card from './shared/Card'; import Button from './shared/Button'; import { CheckCircleIcon } from './icons'; const CreditScoreGauge: React.FC<{ score: number }> = ({ score }) => { const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * 45; const offset = circumference - (score / 1000) * circumference; return (
{score} Co-op Score
); }; const DeFiPortal: React.FC = () => { return (

DeFi Access Portal

Unlock financial services powered by your on-chain reputation.

Your Co-op Credit Score

Based on your trade history, token earnings, and governance participation.

Micro-Loan Eligibility

You are pre-approved for a low-interest loan to invest in your farm.

Loan Amount

$5,000

at 3.5% APR

How it Works

  • Build Reputation: Every successful trade and token earned on DOFTA improves your score.
  • Access Capital: Your on-chain history replaces traditional credit checks, unlocking fair financing.
  • Grow Your Farm: Use loans for equipment, seeds, or infrastructure to increase your yield and sustainability.
); }; export default DeFiPortal;

entries.description: Create the Governance Dashboard screen for DAO voting and proposals.

diffs.replacement:
import React from 'react'; import Card from './shared/Card'; import Button from './shared/Button'; import { GovernanceProposal } from '../types'; import { GovIcon } from './icons'; const mockProposals: GovernanceProposal[] = [ { id: '1', title: 'Reduce Marketplace Fee from 2% to 1.5%', description: 'A proposal to lower the platform fee to increase farmer take-home revenue.', status: 'active', votesFor: 12500, votesAgainst: 3200, endDate: '3 days' }, { id: '2', title: 'Fund a new cold storage facility', description: 'Allocate 500,000 WASTE tokens from the treasury to co-fund a regional cold storage unit.', status: 'passed', votesFor: 25000, votesAgainst: 1800, endDate: '1 month ago' }, { id: '3', title: 'Integrate with a new logistics partner', description: 'Onboard "Farm-to-Table Logistics" to provide cheaper shipping options for farmers.', status: 'failed', votesFor: 8000, votesAgainst: 9500, endDate: '2 months ago' }, ]; const statusColors = { active: { bg: 'bg-blue-100', text: 'text-blue-800', border: 'border-blue-500' }, passed: { bg: 'bg-green-100', text: 'text-green-800', border: 'border-green-500' }, failed: { bg: 'bg-red-100', text: 'text-red-800', border: 'border-red-500' }, }; const Governance: React.FC = () => { return (

Governance

Have your say in the future of the DOFTA co-operative.

Your Voting Power

350 DOFTA

Earn more by participating and trading.

Active Proposals

{mockProposals.filter(p => p.status === 'active').map(proposal => (

{proposal.title}

Active

{proposal.description}

{proposal.votesFor.toLocaleString()} For

{proposal.votesAgainst.toLocaleString()} Against

Voting ends in {proposal.endDate}

 ))}

Voting History

{mockProposals.filter(p => p.status !== 'active').map(proposal => (

{proposal.title}

{proposal.status}

{proposal.endDate}

 ))}
); }; export default Governance;
